title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Co-Scientist is a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system that iteratively generates, debates, and evolves novel scientific hypotheses. It is designed to accelerate scientific breakthroughs by helping researchers connect disparate facts and formulate testable hypotheses for complex problems.
